actions.title:
Professional
Development
actions.description:
Increased or Improved Action: Professional Development will be
offered to ensure that teachers and aides have strategies to teach the
essential standards. PD will focus on strategies that will meet the
needs of our ELs and Economically Disadvantaged students.

actions.title:
Library and Media
Aide
actions.description:
The library/media aide will be at Sherman Oaks to specifically support
literacy and digital literacy in Spanish and English.

actions.title:
After School
Interventions
actions.description:
Increased or Improved Action: Offer after school tutoring in Spanish
and English Language Arts to targeted students.

actions.title:
Data Analysis and
Goal Setting Staff
Retreat
actions.description:
Teachers and staff will convene in a one-day retreat to analyze
student data and set academic and behavior goals for our students.

actions.title:
Professional Learning
Communities:
Implementation
actions.description:
Increased or Improved Action: Substitutes will release grade-level
teams to engage in the PLC collaborative process: Teachers will plan
around the essential standards, analyze student data, and develop
plans for students that are not achieving and for those that have met
the standards.

actions.title:
Field Trips and
Outdoor Experiences
for Students
actions.description:
Offer real-life experiences for student through field trips for language
development.

actions.contributing_raw:
No Longer Funding in
this Action -
conferences and
mileage (see action
1.1)

actions.title:
Professional Learning
from Consultants
actions.description:
Professional Development consultant will be hired to support our staff
in further developing language development strategies to strengthen
language acquisition and our Dual Language program.

actions.title:
Administrator support
for MTSS
Implementation
actions.description:
Increased or Improved Action: Assistant Principal to support the
development and leadership of MTSS including instructional,
behavioral, and SEL strategies.

actions.title:
Targeted
Interventions
actions.description:
Instructional Associates will support the implementation of targeted
intervention strategies in Reading and Math based on student
achievement data.

actions.title:
Web-based
Math/Reading
Programs and
Assessments
actions.description:
Web-based resources including iStation, NewsELA, SumDog and
RAZKids will be purchased and implemented to assess and
supplement our instructional programs.

actions.title:
Reading Intervention
Teacher
actions.description:
Reading Intervention teacher (1.0 FTE) for lower grades and Reading
Intervention teacher (.5 FTE) for upper grades

actions.title: Equity TOSA
actions.description:
Provide teacher consultation for high quality first instruction and
interventions

actions.title:
No Longer Funding in
this Action -
conferences and
mileage (see action
1.1)

goals.description: Provide high quality social emotional learning for all students.

actions.title:
Campus PBIS
Support and
Supervisor
actions.description:
The Campus Supervisor at Sherman Oaks will support the additional
behavioral and social emotional needs of students. They will
implement PBIS Tier 1 and Tier 2 strategies and monitor progress for
students.

actions.title:
PBIS and SEL
Materials and
Supplies
actions.description:
Materials and supplies will be purchased to support our PBIS and SEL
programs (Tiers 1, 2, and 3), including our acknowledgement system,
Toolbox curriculum, and Character Strong curriculum.

actions.title: MTSS Aide
actions.description:
Provide academic and behavior interventions for students identified by
the tier 2/intervention team.

actions.title: School Counselor
actions.description:
Provide multi-tiered approach of school counseling services in each
counseling domain

goals.description: Fully engage parents/guardians, and the community in support of student well-being.

actions.title:
Family Engagement
and Learning
actions.description:
Materials will be purchased to support our Parent Resource Center,
Parent University program, or other parent engagement opportunities
(such as Los Dichos and FEI). This also includes the purchasing of
materials for parent education such as English Language classes or
resources used for parenting classes.

actions.title:
Motivating Family
Participation
actions.description:
To encourage parents and community members to participate in
school events with materials, light snacks and refreshments offered.

actions.title: Community Liaison
actions.description:
P rovide resources to parents and coordinate learning opportunities
and services for families in need.
